# Anvilshare

> Anvilshare replaces expensive SaaS for small businesses with software they actually own. Pricing is a slice of what the customer saves on their old vendor. We also sell a lighter wedge called the AI Ops Cockpit, a private setup that keeps a founder's business memory in one place and runs scheduled checks.

## What we offer

- **SaaS replacement.** We audit the customer's stack, identify the most expensive replaceable system, build a custom replacement in 2 to 4 weeks, and split the savings for 36 months. After that the customer owns or licenses the software cheap.
- **AI Ops Cockpit.** A private AI operations setup for founders, agencies, and small operators. Includes a private chat channel, local-first memory, a simple dashboard, five starter automations, and weekly health checks for 30 days. Two pilot tiers: Founder ($500 setup, $99/month) and Operator ($1,500 setup, $199/month).
- **Audit only.** A 90-minute working session plus a written report on every login the customer pays for, with replacement targets and the math on each. Flat fee $500 to $2,000.

## Who it is for

- Small and mid-sized businesses paying $200 a month or more for SaaS like ServiceTitan, Jobber, Mitchell1, or Buildium.
- Boring verticals where the incumbent software is old and expensive: HVAC, plumbing, dental, dumpster hauling, landscaping, auto shops, small retail.
- Founder-led companies, agencies, and consultants tired of copy-paste soup between AI chats.

## Who it is not for

- Regulated medical, legal, or banking workflows as the primary use case.
- Anyone expecting polished self-serve SaaS.
- Customers whose monthly software bill is under $200 a month. The savings math does not work for either side.

## How it works

1. The audit. 90-minute session plus a written report. Flat fee, you keep the report.
2. The build. If the math is good, we build the replacement in 2 to 4 weeks. You keep paying your old vendor until ours actually works.
3. Share the savings. The day you cancel the old vendor, our meter starts. You pay us a slice of what you stopped paying them, with a $200 floor, for 36 months. Then you license cheap or walk with your data.

## Pricing

- **Audit:** $500 to $2,000 flat, one time.
- **Build:** No charge up front. Paid out of savings.
- **Monthly during the deal:** A percentage of saved SaaS spend, $200 floor.
- **Term:** 36 months, then license cheap or take your data.
- **AI Ops Cockpit Founder pilot:** $500 setup, $99 a month.
- **AI Ops Cockpit Operator pilot:** $1,500 setup, $199 a month.

## Important pages

- [Home](https://anvilshare.ai/): the offer in plain language.
- [AI Ops Cockpit](https://anvilshare.ai/ai-ops-cockpit.html): the lighter pilot product.
- [Alternatives](https://anvilshare.ai/alternatives.html): honest comparison vs ServiceTitan, Jobber, Zapier-stitched setups, contract devs, and AI consultancies.
- [FAQ](https://anvilshare.ai/faq.html): pricing, ownership, support, data, and what happens when it breaks.

## Contact

- Email: hello@anvilshare.com
- Service area: United States. Based in Kansas City, Missouri. International is case by case.
- Response time: within one business day.

## About

- Owner: Anvilshare is a DBA of Groundlayer LLC, a Missouri holding company run by Simon Paige.
- Location: Kansas City, Missouri.
- Founded: 2026.
- Sibling brands under Groundlayer: RivalDrop (competitive intel for sales teams), Groundlayer (parent).
